title: launaea fragilis subsp. tenuiloba
intro: Launaea fragilis subsp. tenuiloba is a plant species, also known as a type of prickly lettuce or winged leaf lettuce, that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate digestive issues such as constipation and indigestion. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Launaea fragilis subsp. tenuiloba is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits, which include promoting overall well-being, boosting energy, and supporting the immune system.
